mapper.sql: id, reporter_id, target_type, target_id, reason, detail, status, create_time
id, reporter_id, target_type, target_id, reason, detail, status, create_time
mapper.insert: insert into report() values(#{id, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{reporterId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{targetType}, #{targetId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{reason}, #{detail}, #{status}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: update report set status = #{status} where id = #{id, jdbcType=BINARY}
